name: Purple Haze
description: Vibrant purples and magentas with adaptive dark mode support for a modern, creative look.

preview.sampleText: Bold, creative, and modern with seamless light and dark mode transitions.

classes.h1: text-4xl font-bold mb-4 text-purple-700 dark:text-purple-400 tracking-tight
classes.a: text-purple-600 dark:text-fuchsia-400 hover:text-purple-700 dark:hover:text-fuchsia-300 underline underline-offset-4 decoration-purple-400/50 hover:decoration-purple-600
classes.img: max-w-full my-4 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl shadow-purple-500/20 dark:shadow-purple-500/40
classes.tr: border-b border-purple-200 dark:border-purple-800 hover:bg-purple-50 dark:hover:bg-purple-900/30 transition-colors
classes.td: border border-purple-300 dark:border-purple-700 p-3 text-gray-700 dark:text-purple-100
classes.th: border border-purple-300 dark:border-purple-700 p-3 bg-purple-100 dark:bg-purple-900 font-bold text-purple-800 dark:text-purple-300
classes.blockquote: border-l-4 border-fuchsia-500 dark:border-fuchsia-400 pl-4 italic my-4 text-purple-700 dark:text-purple-300 bg-purple-50 dark:bg-purple-900/40 py-3 pr-4 rounded-r
classes.code: bg-purple-100 dark:bg-purple-900 px-2 py-1 rounded font-mono text-sm text-purple-700 dark:text-fuchsia-400 border border-purple-200 dark:border-purple-700
classes.pre: bg-purple-50 dark:bg-indigo-950 p-4 rounded-xl overflow-x-auto border border-purple-200 dark:border-purple-800 my-4 shadow-inner
classes.body: bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-50 to-fuchsia-50 dark:from-indigo-950 dark:to-purple-950 p-8 text-gray-700 dark:text-purple-100
